prompt: I already have docs/intermediate/24-functions-docker.md with one docker lab (suffix 1) about defining functions. Add a second lab (suffix 2) that shows a recursive function for factorial, and a third lab (suffix 3) that shows a function with default arguments.

assertions.description: File now contains docker lab divs with suffixes 2 and 3
Lab 2 starter code defines and calls a factorial function using recursion
Lab 3 starter code demonstrates a function with at least one default parameter
No element IDs are duplicated — suffix 1 elements still present, suffix 2 and 3 are new
